Huntingdon/Station 2 South Capacity for March 13 ID1 - March 16 REVISED


Notice Text:

Further to Notice #174517, Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on T South:

Huntingdon Delivery Area Capacity

March 13 ID1 - March 16: 2,040,000 GJ

Station 2 South Capacity

March 13 ID1 - March 16: 2,173,878 GJ

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
